title: Verilog reader doesn't resolve scope correctly when new wire is declared with same named wire in assignment

features.name: wire shadowing in generate block with parent scope reference
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration inside a generate block that shadows a parent scope wire, where the wire is assigned using the parent scope wire's bit range
features.snippet: generate if (1) begin: g0 wire [31:0] data = data[63:32]; end endgenerate

features.name: nested generate blocks with multi-level wire shadowing
features.description: Code should include nested generate blocks where inner wires shadow outer wires, with assignments referencing the parent scope wire's bit range at each level
features.snippet: generate if (1) begin: g0 wire [31:0] data = data[63:32]; if (1) begin: g1 wire [7:0] data = data[15:8]; end end endgenerate
